catalog.name: Development and Evaluation of the Simplified Tropospheric Chemistry Mechanism T4 in the Community Earth System Model (CESM) for Climate Simulations

dataset.name: Development and Evaluation of the Simplified Tropospheric Chemistry Mechanism T4 in the Community Earth System Model (CESM) for Climate Simulations

documentation.xlink:title: NCAR GDEX - Development and Evaluation of the Simplified Tropospheric Chemistry Mechanism T4 in the Community Earth System Model (CESM) for Climate Simulations(d155028)

metadata.documentation: The archived dataset includes all model output used to support the analysis in this paper titled "Development and Evaluation of the Simplified Tropospheric Chemistry Mechanism T4 in the Community Earth System Model (CESM) for Climate Simulations". It contains five years of monthly data (2004-2008) from both the T1 and T4 simulations.
